message:
fix(tools): track byte_count for partial tail truncation correctly

Fix truncate_tail() to update byte_count when inserting a partial last
line, preventing the output_bytes field from being stale. Previously,
byte_count remained 0 when only a truncated partial line was collected,
causing the TruncationResult to underreport output size.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
